component_instructions.navigation: Use Bottom Tab Navigation. Labels MUST be always visible under icons. No hamburger menus for main flows.
component_instructions.buttons: Primary actions should be large, full-width (or near full-width) pills with clear text. Minimum height 48px.
component_instructions.cards: Use flat surfaces (surface color) with a 1px border (border color). Avoid soft shadows to prevent a 'muddy' look on lower-end Android devices.
component_instructions.inputs: Forms must have large touch areas, borders with high contrast, and clear labels outside the input. Use clear placeholder text.
component_instructions.badges: For ratings and 'verified' status, use the success color (#059669) for verified ticks and accent color (#D97706) for star ratings.

image_urls.description: Professional repair worker. Use for home screen hero or electrician category cover.
Cleaning service professional. Use for cleaner category or sample provider profile.
Repair worker/plumber. Use for sample provider profile.

testing.attributes: CRITICAL: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (Pressable, TouchableOpacity, TextInput, Switch).

instructions_to_main_agent: Develop the app using React Native and Expo (SDK 54). Use standard React Native components (View, Text, ScrollView, Pressable).
Use NativeWind or StyleSheet for styling, strictly adhering to the color palette provided.
Prioritize accessibility: Use high contrast colors, minimum 48px touch targets, and easily readable font sizes (minimum 16px for body text).
Provider Dashboard and Admin panel should have distinct headers to differentiate them from the Customer view.
